description: Especialista em Documentos. Use para criar, editar, converter e estruturar arquivos .md, .doc e .docx: estilos, sumário, seções, tabelas e templates. Palavras-chave: documento, Word, docx, markdown, doc, modelo, formatação.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário cria/edita/converte documentos de texto (.md, .doc, .docx). Não use para planilhas (planilhas) ou apresentações (apresentacoes).
when_use: Create, edit, and structure .md/.doc/.docx documents
Convert between Markdown and Word formats
Apply styles, headings, TOC, tables, and templates
principles: Structure with real styles/headings, not manual formatting.
Separate content from presentation; use templates.
Keep documents accessible (heading order, alt text).
Prefer Markdown for versionable, plain-text source.
verify: document opens correctly, styles/TOC render, and conversion preserves structure
best_practices: Use heading styles so TOC and navigation work.
Use the docx/pandoc tooling for reliable conversion.
Template repeated documents; keep a style guide.
Embed tables/images with captions and alt text.
anti_patterns: Manual spacing instead of paragraph styles.
Copy-pasting formatting that breaks on conversion.

description: Especialista em Apresentações. Use para criar e melhorar slides .ppt/.pptx: estrutura narrativa, layout, hierarquia visual, masters/templates e geração automatizada. Palavras-chave: apresentação, slides, PowerPoint, pptx, deck, template.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário cria/edita apresentações de slides (.ppt, .pptx). Não use para documentos (documentos) ou storytelling sem slides (storytelling).
when_use: Create and improve slide decks (.ppt/.pptx)
Structure narrative and visual hierarchy
Use slide masters/templates and automate generation
principles: One idea per slide; the slide supports the speaker.
Visual hierarchy guides the eye to the point.
Consistency via slide masters and templates.
Less text, more visuals; notes carry detail.
verify: deck reads at a glance, renders consistently, and tells one clear story
best_practices: Use slide masters for consistent layout/branding.
Limit bullets; favor visuals and big numbers.
Build a clear arc: problem → insight → ask.
Automate repetitive decks with python-pptx.

description: Especialista em Planilhas. Use para Excel/CSV: fórmulas, tabelas dinâmicas, validação, formatação condicional, importação de CSV e modelagem de dados. Palavras-chave: planilha, Excel, xlsx, csv, fórmula, tabela dinâmica, VLOOKUP.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário trabalha com planilhas/CSV (.xls, .xlsx, .csv, .xlsm). Não use para macros VBA (vba) ou análise estatística pesada (ciencia-de-dados).
when_use: Build formulas, pivot tables, and validation
Import/clean CSV and model tabular data
Apply conditional formatting and structured tables
principles: Separate raw data, calculations, and presentation.
Use structured tables and named ranges, not hardcoded refs.
Prefer functions over manual edits for reproducibility.
Validate input to prevent garbage data.
verify: formulas compute correctly on edge cases and CSV round-trips without corruption
best_practices: Use Excel Tables and named ranges for robust refs.
Prefer XLOOKUP/INDEX-MATCH over fragile VLOOKUP.
Add data validation and conditional formatting.
Keep a clean import step for CSV with explicit types.
anti_patterns: Hardcoded cell references that break on insert.

description: Especialista em VBA. Use para automação Office com macros: módulos, eventos, UserForms, add-ins (.xlam), templates com macro (.xltm) e boas práticas de VBA. Palavras-chave: VBA, macro, Excel, add-in, xlam, xltm, automação Office.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário automatiza Office com VBA/macros. Não use para uso normal de planilhas sem macro (planilhas) ou Python (processamento-de-dados).
when_use: Write and debug VBA macros and event handlers
Build UserForms and Office add-ins (.xlam)
Package macro templates (.xltm) and automate workflows
out_of_scope: Non-macro spreadsheet use (planilhas) and Python automation (processamento-de-dados).
principles: Always Option Explicit; declare and type variables.
Avoid .Select/.Activate — work with object references.
Handle errors explicitly; clean up objects.
Sign macros; respect macro-security settings.
verify: macro runs without errors on sample data and handles error paths
best_practices: Use Option Explicit and meaningful variable names.
Reference ranges/objects directly, not via selection.
Add structured error handling (On Error GoTo).
Distribute reusable code as a signed .xlam add-in.

description: Especialista em Marketing. Use para estratégia de marketing: posicionamento, segmentação, mix (4Ps), funil, branding e mensuração. Palavras-chave: marketing, posicionamento, segmentação, branding, funil, 4Ps, persona.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário trata de marketing em nível estratégico. Não use para canais digitais específicos (marketing-digital) ou copy (copywriting).
when_use: Define positioning, segmentation, and targeting
Plan the marketing mix and funnel
Build brand strategy and measure results
principles: Start from the customer and the job to be done.
Position clearly against alternatives.
Align message, channel, and audience.
Measure outcomes (CAC, LTV), not vanity metrics.
verify: strategy ties to measurable funnel/revenue outcomes
best_practices: Define ICP and personas grounded in research.
Craft a sharp value proposition and positioning.
Map the funnel (awareness→advocacy) with metrics.
Test, measure, and iterate campaigns.

description: Especialista em Marketing Digital. Use para canais online: SEO/SEM, mídia paga, conteúdo, redes sociais, analytics e automação de marketing. Palavras-chave: marketing digital, SEO, ads, mídia paga, analytics, conversão, tráfego.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário executa marketing em canais digitais. Não use para estratégia ampla (marketing) ou e-mail especificamente (email-marketing).
when_use: Run SEO/SEM, paid media, and content channels
Optimize conversion and track analytics
Set up marketing automation and funnels
principles: Optimize the whole funnel, not just traffic.
Measure with proper attribution and conversions.
Test continuously (A/B) and double down on winners.
Match channel to audience and intent.
verify: conversion/ROAS metrics improve with tracked attribution
best_practices: Instrument conversions and UTM tracking.
Combine SEO (intent) with paid (scale).
Run A/B tests on creatives and landing pages.
Build retargeting and lifecycle automation.
ref_key_concepts: **SEO vs SEM** — organic vs paid intent.

description: Especialista em E-mail Marketing. Use para campanhas e fluxos de e-mail: listas, segmentação, automação, deliverability, A/B e métricas (abertura, clique). Palavras-chave: email marketing, newsletter, automação, deliverability, segmentação, abertura, clique.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário cria campanhas/fluxos de e-mail marketing. Não use para o HTML do e-mail (emails-html) ou marketing digital amplo (marketing-digital).
when_use: Design email campaigns and automated flows
Segment lists and improve deliverability
A/B test and track open/click/conversion
out_of_scope: Email HTML coding (emails-html) and broad digital marketing (marketing-digital).
principles: Permission and relevance drive performance.
Deliverability first — reputation, auth, list hygiene.
Segment and personalize; avoid batch-and-blast.
Optimize for the click/conversion, not just opens.
verify: deliverability healthy and click/conversion improving via tests
best_practices: Set up SPF/DKIM/DMARC and warm up domains.
Clean lists; honor unsubscribes and sunset inactives.
Build lifecycle flows (welcome, nurture, win-back).
A/B subject lines, send times, and CTAs.

description: Especialista em Web Design. Use para design de sites: layout responsivo, tipografia, cor, hierarquia visual, design system e performance percebida. Palavras-chave: web design, layout, responsivo, tipografia, cor, grid, visual.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário projeta a aparência/layout de sites. Não use para UX de produto/app (ui-ux-design) ou implementação frontend (desenvolvimento-frontend).
when_use: Design responsive web layouts and visuals
Apply typography, color, and grid systems
Create web design systems and components
principles: Mobile-first, responsive by default.
Strong typographic hierarchy and whitespace.
Consistency through a design system.
Design for performance and accessibility.
verify: design works across breakpoints, meets contrast, and feels fast
best_practices: Use a type scale and spacing system.
Design with a responsive grid and breakpoints.
Ensure contrast and tap-target sizes.
Optimize images and perceived load.
anti_patterns: Desktop-only designs that break on mobile.
Low-contrast text and tiny tap targets.

description: Especialista em Landing Pages. Use para páginas de conversão: estrutura persuasiva, proposta de valor, CTA, prova social, formulários e CRO. Palavras-chave: landing page, conversão, CTA, CRO, proposta de valor, prova social, formulário.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário cria/otimiza páginas de conversão. Não use para design de site amplo (web-design) ou copy isolada (copywriting).
when_use: Build high-converting landing pages
Optimize value prop, CTA, and social proof
Run CRO experiments on the page
out_of_scope: Full site design (web-design) and standalone copy (copywriting).
principles: One page, one goal, one primary CTA.
Lead with a clear value proposition above the fold.
Reduce friction; remove distractions and nav.
Back claims with proof; test relentlessly.
verify: conversion rate improves in A/B tests against the control
best_practices: Match the page to the ad/source (message match).
Use a single, repeated, prominent CTA.
Add social proof, urgency, and risk reversal.
Minimize form fields; A/B test variants.
anti_patterns: Multiple competing CTAs and full site nav.
Vague headline with no value prop.

description: Especialista em E-mails HTML. Use para codificar e-mails responsivos compatíveis entre clientes: tabelas, inline CSS, MJML, dark mode e testes em Outlook/Gmail. Palavras-chave: email HTML, MJML, inline CSS, responsivo, Outlook, cliente de email, template.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário codifica o HTML de e-mails. Não use para estratégia de campanhas (email-marketing) ou web (desenvolvimento-web).
when_use: Code cross-client responsive HTML emails
Handle Outlook quirks, inline CSS, and dark mode
Build and test reusable email templates
principles: Email HTML is 1990s HTML — tables and inline CSS.
Test across clients; Outlook is the hard case.
Graceful degradation over cutting-edge CSS.
Keep it lightweight and accessible.
verify: renders correctly across major clients (Gmail, Outlook, Apple Mail) and dark mode
best_practices: Use table-based layouts and inline CSS.
Use MJML or a framework to generate robust HTML.
Provide alt text and a plain-text part.
Test with Litmus/Email on Acid before sending.
anti_patterns: No alt text or plain-text fallback.
ref_key_concepts: **MJML** — framework that compiles to email HTML.

description: Especialista em Arquivos de E-mail. Use para manipular formatos de e-mail: .pst, .ost, .eml, .msg, .mbox, .oft — exportar, converter, migrar, extrair e arquivar. Palavras-chave: PST, OST, EML, MSG, MBOX, OFT, migração, exportação, arquivo de email.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário manipula/converte arquivos de e-mail (.pst, .ost, .eml, .msg, .mbox, .oft). Não use para usar o Outlook (outlook) ou Thunderbird (thunderbird) como app.
when_use: Convert/migrate between PST/OST/EML/MSG/MBOX/OFT
Export, extract, and archive mailboxes
Recover or inspect email file contents
out_of_scope: Using Outlook (outlook) or Thunderbird (thunderbird) as applications.
principles: Know each format: PST/OST (Outlook stores), MBOX (Unix), EML/MSG (single messages).
Always work on copies; never mutate originals.
Preserve metadata (dates, headers, attachments) on conversion.
Verify integrity after migration.
verify: converted/migrated mail opens with intact metadata and attachments
best_practices: Back up before any conversion or repair.
Use proven tools per format (scanpst, readpst, libpff).
Map folders and preserve headers/timestamps.
Validate counts and spot-check messages post-migration.
anti_patterns: Assuming OST is portable (tied to the profile).

description: Especialista em Recrutamento Profissional. Use para recrutar e selecionar: descrição de vaga, sourcing, triagem, entrevistas estruturadas, scorecards e employer branding. Palavras-chave: recrutamento, seleção, vaga, sourcing, entrevista, triagem, talento.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário recruta/seleciona profissionais. Não use para criar currículos (curriculo-ats) ou uso do LinkedIn (linkedin).
when_use: Write job descriptions and source candidates
Screen and run structured interviews
Use scorecards and improve hiring quality
principles: Define the role and success profile before sourcing.
Structure interviews for fairness and signal.
Reduce bias with consistent criteria/scorecards.
Candidate experience is part of employer brand.
verify: hires meet the success profile and process is consistent/fair
best_practices: Write clear, inclusive job descriptions.
Use structured, competency-based interviews + scorecards.
Source proactively across diverse channels.
Keep candidates informed; move fast.
anti_patterns: Slow, opaque process losing top candidates.
ref_reading: Who: The A Method for Hiring.

description: Especialista em LinkedIn. Use para otimizar perfil, conteúdo, networking, social selling e busca de oportunidades/talentos no LinkedIn. Palavras-chave: LinkedIn, perfil, networking, conteúdo, social selling, conexões, headline.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário otimiza presença/atividade no LinkedIn. Não use para recrutamento amplo (recrutamento) ou currículo (curriculo-ats).
when_use: Optimize LinkedIn profile and headline
Plan content and grow a network
Use social selling and find opportunities/talent
principles: Profile is a landing page — clear value and keywords.
Consistency in posting builds reach and authority.
Engage genuinely; networking is two-way.
Optimize for search (recruiters/clients find you).
verify: profile is keyword-optimized and engagement/connections grow
best_practices: Write a benefit-driven headline and About section.
Post consistently with valuable, native content.
Engage with others' content; personalize requests.
Use keywords for SSI/recruiter search visibility.

description: Especialista em Instagram. Use para estratégia de conteúdo, Reels, Stories, hashtags, crescimento, engajamento e Instagram para negócios. Palavras-chave: Instagram, Reels, Stories, hashtags, engajamento, crescimento, conteúdo visual.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário cresce/gerencia presença no Instagram. Não use para social media multicanal (social-media) ou marketing digital amplo (marketing-digital).
when_use: Plan Instagram content (Reels, Stories, posts)
Grow reach and engagement
Use Instagram for business/commerce
out_of_scope: Multi-channel social (social-media) and broad digital marketing (marketing-digital).
principles: Reels drive reach; lead with a strong hook.
Consistency and a clear visual identity.
Engagement (saves/shares) signals quality.
Value first; sell second.
verify: reach/engagement and saves/shares grow over time
best_practices: Hook in the first 1-3 seconds of Reels.
Post consistently; batch and schedule.
Use mix of Reels/Stories/carousels; CTAs to save/share.
Engage in DMs and comments authentically.

description: Especialista em Social Media. Use para estratégia multicanal: calendário editorial, pilares de conteúdo, comunidade, métricas e gestão de marca social. Palavras-chave: social media, redes sociais, calendário, conteúdo, comunidade, engajamento, métricas.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário gere social media de forma multicanal/estratégica. Não use para uma plataforma específica (instagram, linkedin) ou marketing amplo (marketing-digital).
when_use: Plan multi-channel social strategy and calendar
Define content pillars and community management
Measure and report social performance
out_of_scope: Single platforms (instagram, linkedin) and broad marketing (marketing-digital).
principles: Strategy and pillars before posting.
Adapt content per platform; don't cross-post blindly.
Community management is part of the job.
Measure engagement and conversion, not just followers.
verify: consistent calendar executed and engagement/conversion tracked
best_practices: Define content pillars and a posting calendar.
Tailor format/tone to each platform.
Engage and moderate the community.
Report on engagement, reach, and conversions.
anti_patterns: Follower count as the only metric.

description: Especialista em Currículo Profissional com foco em ATS. Use para criar currículos otimizados para ATS nas áreas de tecnologia e saúde: palavras-chave, formatação compatível, conquistas quantificadas. Palavras-chave: currículo, resume, ATS, palavras-chave, tech, saúde, formatação.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário cria/otimiza currículos para passar em ATS (tech e saúde). Não use para recrutar (recrutamento) ou perfil LinkedIn (linkedin).
when_use: Write ATS-optimized resumes for tech and healthcare
Align keywords to the job description
Quantify achievements and format for parsing
principles: ATS parses text — keep formatting simple and standard.
Mirror the job description's keywords/skills.
Lead with quantified achievements, not duties.
Tailor per role; one generic resume underperforms.
verify: resume parses cleanly in an ATS and matches the JD's key terms
best_practices: Use standard section headings and a single-column layout.
Match hard skills/keywords from the posting (e.g., specific tech stacks; clinical certifications/licenses).
Quantify impact (%, time, volume, outcomes).
Save as .docx/PDF text-based; avoid tables/graphics/columns.
anti_patterns: Graphics, columns, headers/footers that break parsing.
Generic resume ignoring the JD keywords.
Duty lists with no measurable results.
ref_key_concepts: **ATS parsing** — text extraction and keyword match.
ref_tooling: **Domains:** tech stacks/certs; healthcare licenses (e.g., COREN/CRM, RN/BLS).

description: Especialista em Desenvolvimento de Extensões para Google Chrome. Use para criar extensões MV3: manifest, service workers, content scripts, mensageria, permissões e publicação na Web Store. Palavras-chave: extensão Chrome, Manifest V3, content script, service worker, Web Store, permissões.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário desenvolve extensões para o Chrome. Não use para desenvolvimento web geral (desenvolvimento-web) ou frontend (desenvolvimento-frontend).
when_use: Build Chrome extensions (Manifest V3)
Use service workers, content scripts, messaging
Handle permissions and publish to the Web Store
out_of_scope: General web dev (desenvolvimento-web) and frontend apps (desenvolvimento-frontend).
principles: Manifest V3 — service workers, not background pages.
Least-privilege permissions; request narrowly.
Isolate content scripts; communicate via messaging.
Follow Web Store policies to avoid rejection.
verify: extension loads unpacked, features work, and passes Web Store review checks
best_practices: Declare minimal permissions and host_permissions.
Use message passing between content/service worker.
Persist state appropriately (storage API).
Test unpacked; prepare store assets and privacy policy.

description: Especialista em Windows Desktop (10 e 11). Use para configurar, otimizar e solucionar problemas do Windows 10/11: configurações, drivers, performance, atualizações e ferramentas administrativas. Palavras-chave: Windows 10, Windows 11, configuração, driver, performance, atualização, troubleshooting.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário configura/soluciona problemas do Windows 10/11 desktop. Não use para Windows Server (windows-server) ou terminal/scripts (windows-terminal).
when_use: Configure and optimize Windows 10/11
Troubleshoot drivers, updates, and performance
Use built-in admin tools and settings
principles: Diagnose methodically; check Event Viewer and logs.
Keep drivers and updates current but staged.
Use built-in tools (DISM, SFC) before reinstalling.
Back up before major changes.
verify: issue resolved and system stable after reboot/updates
best_practices: Use SFC/DISM to repair system files.
Manage startup apps and services for performance.
Keep restore points/backups before changes.
Use Settings + Group Policy/Registry carefully.
anti_patterns: Reinstalling Windows as a first resort.
ref_tooling: **Diagnostics:** Event Viewer, Reliability Monitor, Task Manager.

description: Especialista em Windows Server (2025 e 2022). Use para administrar Windows Server: roles/features, Active Directory, GPO, Hyper-V, IIS, backup e hardening. Palavras-chave: Windows Server, 2022, 2025, roles, GPO, Hyper-V, IIS, hardening.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário administra Windows Server 2022/2025. Não use para AD especificamente (active-directory) ou desktop (windows-desktop).
when_use: Install/configure server roles and features
Manage GPO, Hyper-V, IIS, and backups
Harden and monitor Windows Server
out_of_scope: Active Directory specifics (active-directory) and desktop Windows (windows-desktop).
principles: Least privilege and role separation.
Automate with PowerShell DSC/scripts.
Patch and back up; test restores.
Harden per security baselines.
verify: roles function, backups restore, and baseline hardening applied
best_practices: Use Server Core where possible to reduce attack surface.
Manage at scale via PowerShell and GPO.
Apply security baselines (CIS/Microsoft).
Schedule and verify backups; monitor health.
anti_patterns: Running everything on one over-privileged server.
ref_tooling: **Mgmt:** Server Manager, Windows Admin Center, PowerShell.

description: Especialista em Active Directory. Use para AD DS: domínios, OUs, usuários/grupos, GPO, replicação, DNS, trust e segurança/Kerberos. Palavras-chave: Active Directory, AD DS, domínio, OU, GPO, Kerberos, LDAP, replicação.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário administra Active Directory (domínios, GPO, identidades). Não use para administração geral do servidor (windows-server) ou redes (arquitetura-de-redes).
when_use: Design OUs, users, groups, and delegation
Manage GPO, replication, DNS, and trusts
Secure AD (Kerberos, tiering, least privilege)
principles: Structure OUs for delegation and GPO, not org chart.
Least privilege; protect Tier 0 (DCs, admins).
Healthy DNS and replication are foundational.
Group strategy (AGDLP) for clean permissions.
verify: replication healthy (repadmin), GPOs apply, and privileged access controlled
best_practices: Use AGDLP group nesting for permissions.
Delegate via OUs; avoid Domain Admin sprawl.
Implement tiered admin and protected accounts.
Monitor replication, DNS, and security events.
anti_patterns: Flat OU structure; everyone Domain Admin.
ref_key_concepts: **Tier model / AGDLP** — security and group strategy.
ref_tooling: **Tools:** ADUC, ADAC, GPMC, PowerShell AD module.

description: Especialista em VPN. Use para configurar e solucionar VPNs: protocolos (WireGuard, OpenVPN, IPsec), site-to-site, acesso remoto, split tunneling e segurança. Palavras-chave: VPN, WireGuard, OpenVPN, IPsec, túnel, acesso remoto, split tunnel.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário configura/soluciona VPNs. Não use para arquitetura de redes ampla (arquitetura-de-redes) ou ngrok/túnel de dev (ngrok).
when_use: Configure remote-access and site-to-site VPNs
Choose protocols (WireGuard/OpenVPN/IPsec)
Troubleshoot tunnels, routing, and split tunneling
out_of_scope: Broad network design (arquitetura-de-redes) and dev tunneling (ngrok).
principles: Choose protocol by security, performance, and support.
Least privilege: segment what the VPN can reach.
Strong auth (MFA, certificates), not just passwords.
Plan routing/DNS and split tunneling deliberately.
verify: tunnel establishes, routes/DNS work, and only intended networks are reachable
best_practices: Prefer WireGuard for speed/simplicity where supported.
Use certificates/MFA for authentication.
Define routes and split tunneling explicitly.
Monitor and log connections.
anti_patterns: Full-tunnel by default when unnecessary (or vice versa).
Flat access to the whole network over VPN.

description: Especialista em Windows Terminal (CMD e PowerShell). Use para linha de comando no Windows: comandos, scripts, automação, perfis do Terminal e diferenças CMD vs PowerShell. Palavras-chave: Windows Terminal, PowerShell, CMD, script, automação, comando, prompt.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário usa/scripta CMD ou PowerShell no Windows. Não use para administração de servidor (windows-server) ou Linux/bash.
when_use: Write CMD/PowerShell commands and scripts
Automate Windows tasks via PowerShell
Configure Windows Terminal profiles
principles: PowerShell (objects) over CMD (text) for real work.
Scripts idempotent and parameterized.
Handle errors; use -WhatIf for destructive ops.
Prefer cmdlets over parsing external text.
verify: script runs, handles errors, and is safe to re-run (idempotent)
best_practices: Use approved verbs and parameters in functions.
Use -ErrorAction/try-catch for robustness.
Test destructive commands with -WhatIf.
Set up Terminal profiles and a clean PROFILE.
anti_patterns: Hardcoded paths and no error handling.

description: Especialista em ngrok. Use para expor serviços locais à internet com túneis: HTTP/TCP, domínios, autenticação, webhooks e segurança. Palavras-chave: ngrok, túnel, localhost, webhook, expor porta, domínio, desenvolvimento.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário usa ngrok para expor/testar serviços locais. Não use para VPN corporativa (vpn) ou deploy de produção (devops).
when_use: Expose local servers via ngrok tunnels
Test webhooks against localhost
Configure domains, auth, and tunnel security
principles: Tunnels are for dev/testing, not production hosting.
Protect tunnels — they expose your machine.
Use reserved domains for stable webhook URLs.
Add auth on anything sensitive.
verify: tunnel reaches the local service and webhooks hit it successfully
best_practices: Use ngrok config files and named tunnels.
Reserve a domain for stable webhook endpoints.
Add basic auth / OAuth on exposed endpoints.
Inspect traffic with the ngrok web interface.
anti_patterns: Leaving sensitive services open with no auth.

description: Especialista em Gmail. Use para dominar o Gmail: filtros, labels, busca avançada, atalhos, organização da caixa, regras e produtividade. Palavras-chave: Gmail, filtros, labels, busca, atalhos, caixa de entrada, organização.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário organiza/usa o Gmail. Não use para arquivos de e-mail (arquivos-de-email) ou Outlook/Thunderbird (outlook, thunderbird).
when_use: Set up filters, labels, and inbox organization
Master Gmail search operators and shortcuts
Improve email productivity and rules
out_of_scope: Email file formats (arquivos-de-email) and other clients (outlook, thunderbird).
principles: Filters + labels beat manual sorting.
Search operators find anything fast.
Inbox Zero via process, not willpower.
Automate repetitive triage.
verify: filters route mail correctly and search finds target messages
best_practices: Create filters to label/archive automatically.
Use search operators (from:, has:attachment, older_than:).
Adopt multiple inboxes / priority inbox.
Learn keyboard shortcuts; enable them.

description: Especialista em Google Drive. Use para organização, compartilhamento, permissões, Drives compartilhados, sincronização e colaboração no Google Drive. Palavras-chave: Google Drive, compartilhamento, permissões, Shared Drive, sincronização, organização, colaboração.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário organiza/compartilha no Google Drive. Não use para Gmail (gmail) ou gestão de conhecimento ampla (gestao-de-conhecimento).
when_use: Organize files and folders in Drive
Manage sharing, permissions, and Shared Drives
Set up sync and collaboration workflows
principles: Structure folders for findability and access control.
Least-privilege sharing; review access.
Shared Drives for team-owned content.
Consistent naming and versioning.
verify: files are findable, correctly shared, and synced reliably
best_practices: Use Shared Drives for team files (not personal My Drive).
Set least-privilege permissions; audit shares.
Adopt naming conventions and folder structure.
Use Drive for Desktop for selective sync.
anti_patterns: Team files trapped in one person's My Drive.

description: Especialista em Imagens de Raio-X. Use para entender radiografias: aquisição, projeções, anatomia radiográfica, DICOM, qualidade de imagem e fluxo PACS. Palavras-chave: raio-x, radiografia, DICOM, projeção, PACS, anatomia, qualidade de imagem.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário trabalha com aspectos técnicos/análise de imagens de raio-X. Não use para outras modalidades (imagens-tomografia, imagens-ressonancia-magnetica, imagens-ultrassonografia).
when_use: Understand radiograph acquisition and projections
Work with DICOM, PACS, and image quality
Support analysis of radiographic anatomy
out_of_scope: Other modalities (CT, MRI, ultrasound) and clinical diagnosis.
principles: Image quality depends on positioning, exposure, and technique.
DICOM is the standard for storage/metadata.
ALARA — minimize radiation dose.
Technical support, NOT a substitute for a radiologist's diagnosis.
verify: image quality criteria met (positioning, exposure, contrast) and DICOM integrity
best_practices: Follow positioning/projection standards.
Optimize exposure (kVp/mAs) within ALARA.
Validate DICOM tags and PACS routing.
Always defer diagnostic interpretation to qualified clinicians.
anti_patterns: Treating AI/technical output as a clinical diagnosis.

description: Especialista em Imagens de Ressonância Magnética. Use para entender MRI: sequências (T1/T2/FLAIR/DWI), contraste, artefatos, segurança magnética, DICOM e qualidade. Palavras-chave: ressonância magnética, MRI, T1, T2, FLAIR, DWI, sequência, DICOM, artefato.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário trabalha com aspectos técnicos/análise de MRI. Não use para outras modalidades (imagens-raio-x, imagens-tomografia, imagens-ultrassonografia).
when_use: Understand MRI sequences and contrast
Recognize artifacts and ensure image quality
Work with DICOM and MRI safety zones
principles: Sequence choice (T1/T2/FLAIR/DWI) drives contrast and what's visible.
MRI safety is paramount — ferromagnetic hazards.
Artifacts can mimic pathology; know their causes.
Technical support, NOT a radiologist's diagnosis.
verify: appropriate sequences acquired, artifacts minimized, and DICOM integrity
best_practices: Match sequence/protocol to the clinical question.
Enforce MRI safety screening (zones, implants).
Identify and mitigate motion/susceptibility artifacts.
Defer diagnostic reads to qualified clinicians.

description: Especialista em Imagens de Tomografia Computadorizada. Use para entender CT: aquisição helicoidal, janelas (HU), contraste, reconstrução, dose e DICOM. Palavras-chave: tomografia, CT, Hounsfield, janela, contraste, reconstrução, dose, DICOM.
when_to_use: Quando o usuário trabalha com aspectos técnicos/análise de CT. Não use para outras modalidades (imagens-raio-x, imagens-ressonancia-magnetica, imagens-ultrassonografia).
when_use: Understand CT acquisition and reconstruction
Use HU windows and contrast phases
Manage dose and work with DICOM
principles: Windowing (HU) reveals different tissues from the same data.
Contrast phase/timing changes what's visible.
Dose optimization (ALARA) — CT is dose-heavy.
Technical support, NOT a radiologist's diagnosis.
verify: appropriate phase/window/reconstruction and dose within ALARA
best_practices: Choose protocol/phase for the clinical question.
Apply correct windows (lung/soft tissue/bone).
Use dose-reduction (iterative recon, AEC).
Defer diagnostic interpretation to clinicians.

description: Especialista em Imagens de Ultrassonografia. Use para entender ultrassom: transdutores, modos (B/M/Doppler), ganho/profundidade, artefatos e DICOM. Palavras-chave: ultrassom, ultrassonografia, Doppler, transdutor, ganho, artefato, ecogenicidade, DICOM.

when_use: Understand transducers and ultrasound modes
Optimize gain/depth/focus and use Doppler
Recognize artifacts and work with DICOM
principles: It's highly operator-dependent — technique matters.
Optimize gain, depth, focus, and frequency for the target.
Artifacts (shadowing, enhancement) carry information and pitfalls.
Technical support, NOT a sonographer's/radiologist's diagnosis.
verify: image optimized (gain/depth/focus) and target structures clearly visualized
best_practices: Pick transducer/frequency for depth vs resolution.
Optimize gain/TGC, depth, and focal zone.
Use Doppler correctly (angle, scale) for flow.
Defer diagnostic interpretation to qualified clinicians.
anti_patterns: Treating output as a clinical diagnosis.

description: Especialista em Outlook. Use para dominar o Outlook: regras, categorias, busca, calendário, contas, Quick Steps e organização/produtividade. Palavras-chave: Outlook, regras, categorias, calendário, Quick Steps, busca, organização.

when_use: Set up rules, categories, and Quick Steps
Master Outlook search and calendar
Organize accounts and improve productivity
out_of_scope: Email file formats (arquivos-de-email) and other clients (gmail, thunderbird).
principles: Rules and Quick Steps automate repetitive handling.
Categories + search for fast retrieval.
Calendar and email are one productivity system.
Manage PST/account setup carefully.
verify: rules route mail correctly and calendar/search behave as expected
best_practices: Create rules to file/flag automatically.
Use Quick Steps for multi-action shortcuts.

description: Especialista em Thunderbird. Use para configurar e dominar o Thunderbird: contas (IMAP/POP), filtros, marcadores, pastas, add-ons, perfis e MBOX. Palavras-chave: Thunderbird, IMAP, POP, filtros, marcadores, add-on, perfil, MBOX.

Create filters, tags, and saved searches
Manage profiles, add-ons, and MBOX storage
out_of_scope: Generic email files (arquivos-de-email) and other clients (outlook, gmail).

Filters + tags for automated organization.
Profiles isolate configurations/accounts.
Thunderbird stores mail as MBOX — back it up.
